class.name: PlayFabPartyChat
class.description: Returned by [method PlayFabParty.get_chat]. Most titles should rely on the peer-id helpers on [PlayFabPartyPeer]; this surface remains available for diagnostic and advanced flows that need direct access to the [PlayFabPartyChatControl] objects.

method.name: get_local_chat_control
method.description: Returns the local chat control bound to [param user], if any.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Aggregate signal for chat-control state changes.
